events.description: .git folder fades in with scale spring animation
.git folder pulses with expanding glow — 'the hidden database'
section title 'Three Types of Objects' fades in from below
BLOB card pops in with spring scale — first object type
TREE card pops in with spring scale — second object type
COMMIT card pops in with spring scale — third object type
connecting gradient line draws between all three cards
BLOB card starts glowing — narrator zooms into blob concept
